title: LineItemJurisTax
description: Taxes for a line item for a jurisdiction or region.

id.description: The ID of the jurisdiction or region.

name.description: The name of the jurisdiction or region.

nonTaxableAmount.description: The non-taxable amount of the line item in the smallest denomination of the currency (e.g. cents or pennies).

amount.description: The amount of the exemption in the smallest denomination of the currency (e.g. cents or pennies).

taxableAmount.description: The taxable amount of the line item in the smallest denomination of the currency (e.g. cents or pennies).

taxAmount.description: The tax amount of the line item in the smallest denomination of the currency (e.g. cents or pennies).

inclusive.description: The inclusive tax amount in the smallest denomination of the currency (e.g. cents or pennies).

exclusive.description: The exclusive tax amount in the smallest denomination of the currency (e.g. cents or pennies).
